Gerard ter Borch

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Helena van der Schalcke
by Gerard ter Borch
Dutch Golden Age · c. 1648
A two-year-old in a shimmering white dress, carrying a little basket. Painted at life-size, treated with the gravity usually reserved for adult burghers. Ter Borch's most quietly tender portrait.
←François Bonvin André Paul Borel→
